creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for the delay but 4 weeks have passed since you submitted the
patch so I want to set EXPIRATION_DATE to 2010-10-01 if that is okay
with you. And could you please tell me the reason why people should
upgrade to 1.8?

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
